string.text: %C [255,248,153,26] Black box: \ n %C [Default] coordinates of the second pilot, as well as a strange code - which leads here.
%C [255,248,153,26] MODEL MODULL: \ N %C [Default] Leehouse coordinates, as well as some kind of code.
%C [255,248,153,26] Fuel: \ n %C [default] Inspect the presence of gasoline
%C [255,248,153,26] Crazy scientist: \ n %C [Default] somewhere on this hill, the ecologist hid the key card
%C [255,248,153,26] Colonel Barchuk: \ n %C [Default] wants to meet me
%C [255,248,153,26] Quiet case: \ n %C [Default] In it there are my things
